fieldValues.value: RFC-009 Change A: Add rootTypeRefs to DocumentView

Add optional rootTypeRefs?: ExactTypeRef[] to DocumentView. When set, the DocumentView applies to Containers whose root Record (rootInstanceIds[0]) has a typeId/typeVersion matching any ExactTypeRef entry. ExactTypeRef requires both typeId (UUID) and typeVersion (integer >= 1). Multi-entry OR semantics. Soft-deprecates containerType to a back-compat hint. Conformance rule I-63.

UUID-based anchoring replaces fragile containerType string join. ExactTypeRef is version-exact because the DocumentView-to-Container match is a package-validation-time claim requiring both typeId and typeVersion to resolve.
